scenario_name: Internal IDE code-assistant with private source-code context
description: A software organization deploys an IDE-integrated code assistant for its engineers. The plugin reads the active file plus recent edits as context, calls a hosted LLM, and can optionally invoke a RAG over the company's internal monorepo and design-doc corpus. Engineering identities flow from the corporate IDP; usage telemetry is captured for productivity analytics. Source code is a mix of proprietary application logic, infrastructure-as-code, and security-sensitive components (auth, billing, key handling).
assumptions: LLM provider contracted under enterprise data-isolation terms.
Plugin runs in engineer-managed laptops; not all laptops have endpoint DLP.
Monorepo includes secrets in some test-fixture files (historical state, not policy-compliant).

components.description: Hosted third-party code-tuned LLM, enterprise tier.
Background indexer over monorepo + design-doc corpus.
Single-tenant vector store hosted in corporate VPC.
IDE plugin running in engineer endpoints; reads buffer + open files.
Productivity-analytics pipeline capturing prompts, completions, accept/reject.

risks_identified.rationale: Buffer reads can include secrets, customer data fixtures, or proprietary algorithms; LLM-side memorization risk if any training reuse occurred historically.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Output secret scanner + provider no-training contract.

risks_identified.rationale: Engineers may use unsanctioned coding-assistant variants outside the approved plugin, exfiltrating code into uncontrolled SaaS.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Endpoint policy + DLP partial coverage; org-wide AI-policy training.

risks_identified.rationale: Indirect injection via repository content (README, comments) could coerce assistant into recommending insecure patterns.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: No injection-detection on retrieved chunks yet.

risks_identified.rationale: Productivity-analytics pipeline captures prompts that contain source code, secrets, and customer fixtures.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Field redaction + retention cap; downstream warehouse access still broad.

risks_identified.rationale: IDE context window can grow to include unrelated files an engineer opened; over-broad prompts.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Per-file context cap; no semantic relevance gate.

risks_identified.rationale: Endpoint plugin reads filesystem and active buffer; reach exceeds the immediate task.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Plugin scoped to current workspace; off-workspace files excluded.

risks_identified.rationale: Some annotation/feedback workflow captures engineer-labeled completions for tuning.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Feedback samples redacted before any external use.

risks_identified.rationale: Adversary with engineer credentials can systematically query the assistant to extract proprietary patterns and architectural details.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Per-engineer rate caps; anomalous-query monitoring partial.

risks_identified.rationale: Slopsquatted package suggestions risk; injection via repo README can steer suggestions.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Suggestions validated against internal package allowlist for builds.

existing_controls.description: Plugin scoped to current workspace; reads no off-workspace files.
Output secret-scanner blocks completions containing high-confidence secrets.
Corporate AI-use policy + enforcement on managed laptops.
Suggestions for external packages validated against an internal allowlist at build time.
Per-engineer rate caps + anomaly detection on prompt volume.

control_gaps.description: No injection-detection on retrieved monorepo content.
control_gaps.suggested_remediation: Add injection classifier on retrieved chunks; tag suspicious chunks and exclude from completion context.

control_gaps.description: Endpoint DLP coverage is incomplete; some engineers run on personal devices.
control_gaps.suggested_remediation: Enforce managed-laptop-only for assistant access via IDP conditional access.

control_gaps.description: No semantic relevance gate on context-window assembly.
control_gaps.suggested_remediation: Add a relevance classifier and trim unrelated open files from context.

control_gaps.description: Historical secrets in monorepo test fixtures remain indexed.
control_gaps.suggested_remediation: Run a one-time secret sweep of the index; rotate any still-active secrets; exclude fixture paths from indexing.

framework_alignments.control_name: Access permissions managed with least privilege
Approaches for mapping AI technology and legal risks
Restriction of access to information assets
